documentation.description: Common subprograms useable for all solvers.

subprograms.name: Appliable_Actions

documentation.description: Gives the actions appliable to some states.

subprograms.name: Appliable_Outcomes

documentation.description: Gives the outcomes for a single state.

subprograms.name: Appliable_Outcomes

documentation.description: Gives the outcomes for a series of States.

subprograms.name: Reachable_States

documentation.description: Will compute all states reachable from Initial, at any distance.

subprograms.name: Reachable_With_Policy

documentation.description: All states reachable from Initial given some politic, at any distance.

subprograms.name: Summary_State_Action

documentation.description: Prints, for every state, how many actions can be applied to it.
